codeReview.summary: The feature adds the requested offline preflight, generated handoff artifacts, and honest shell/build messaging, but the core hygiene validator does not actually detect committed private WeChat artifacts. That means the repo can contain illegal checked-in secrets/config and `npm --prefix mini run preflight` would still report PASS.

issues.description: The `local-only WeChat artifact hygiene` check only verifies that `.gitignore` contains the local-only paths. If `mini/project.private.config.json`, `mini/config/runtime.local.js`, or files under `mini/upload-secrets/` are already tracked, Git ignore rules no longer protect them, but this preflight still passes. That violates the feature requirement to fail closed on illegal checked-in private WeChat artifacts and upload material.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The new release-preflight command is part of the feature's verification path, but `.factory/services.yaml` does not expose it. Future agents have to rediscover `npm --prefix mini run preflight` from package.json or handoffs instead of the shared command manifest.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature handoff lines 31-33 record `npm --prefix mini run preflight` as a verification command, while `.factory/services.yaml:1-9` lists install/test/lint/typecheck/build/mini_upload_dry_run/mini_install/mini_validate only.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The repo-wide `data/` ignore rule also ignores newly added files under `mini/data/`, which is easy to miss. The worker discovered this only after `mini/data/release-handoff.js` was ignored and then moved the helper into `mini/lib/`; that convention is not called out in mission shared-state docs.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: The worker transcript skeleton shows `git check-ignore -v "mini/data/release-handoff.js"` returning `.gitignore:78:data/ mini/data/release-handoff.js`, followed immediately by a command whose stated purpose was to move the helper module and update imports.

summary: Reviewed commit `0884179955a9f420e515bf89084cd650a6a38855` for `mini-upload-preflight-and-runtime-handoff`. Status: fail. The feature mostly delivers the intended preflight and handoff scaffolding, but the main hygiene check only inspects `.gitignore` text and will not catch already-tracked private WeChat files or upload secrets.
